-p56JLA9Lb7W.code:
setcps(135/60/4)
stack(

         
  note("d4 c2 g4, d4 g4 c4 g4 c4")
  
    .add(note("d5 a5 a4 a3 f2 g3 d3".fast(4))) 
    .s("square")               
    .decay(0.1).sustain(0)    
    .crush(4)                  
    .gain(0.7)
    .jux(rev)                 
    .delay(0.5).delaytime(0.25), 

  
  s("glitch:2(5,8)")
    .speed("<0.5 0.75 1.5>")
    .room(0.8)              
    .gain(0.6)


)

jy02PmAHUUU7.code:
setcps(135/60/4)
stack(
 s("bd:3(3,8) [sd:2*2, hc]*2")
    .shape(0.6)     
    .hpf(150)       
    .bank("rolandtr909"),
  note("<c1 a1 f1 g1>")
    .s("pulse")
    .lpf(1000).lpq(5) 
    .shape(0.4)      
    .cut(1),          
  note("d4 c2 g4, d4 g4 c4 g4 c4")
  
    .add(note("0 12".fast(4))) 
    .s("square")               
    .decay(0.1).sustain(0)    
    .crush(4)                  
    .gain(0.7)
    .jux(rev)                 
    .delay(0.5).delaytime(0.25), 

  
  s("glitch:2(5,8)")
    .speed("<0.5 0.75 1.5>")
    .room(0.8)              
    .gain(0.6)


)

XfeX8VNH6HC7.code:
setcps(118/60/4)

stack(

  note("c3*16, c2 d2 g2 f2 [d4 c6 f5 ,f6 d4 d5]") 
    .s("sawtooth")
    .lpf(sine.range(300, 3000).speed(0.1)) 
    .lpq(15)       
    .distort(0.6)   
    .gain(0.45)
    .room(0.8)    
    .size(0.9)
    .pan(sine.range(0.2, 0.8).speed(0.5)), 
  note("c1 f5 g4  c2 b3*4")
    .s("sin")
    .gain(0.8)
    .lpf(100),


  s("noise*16")
    .gain(sine.range(0.05, 0.2).speed(2)) 
    .hpf(3000)     
    .clip(2),      

  s("bd:4*2, [~ sd:2]*1, [hc*8]?")
    .crush(4)      
    .shape(0.5)
    .gain(0.7)
)

RzYZzqSILBt3.code:
setcps(105/60/4)

stack(
 
  note("<c2 f2 g2 f2>")
    .s("triangle") 
    .lpf(400)    
    .gain(0.8)
    .attack(0.05),
  note("c4 eb4 g4 bb4".fast(2).struct("1(3,8, 5)"))
    .s("sine")    
    .add(note("0 12".fast(6))) 
    .delay(0.7).delaytime(0.379) 
    .room(0.6).size(0.8)         
    .gain(0.5)
    .jux(rev),    
  note("c6*8?, c2 d4 g5 f4")
    .s("square")
    .decay(0.02).sustain(0)
    .crush(8)     
    .gain(0.2)
    .pan(rand),  
  s("bd:2, [~ sd:1], bd:2, sd:1")
    .lpf(1200)    
    .gain(0.7)
    .shape(0.3)
)
